b'=== Equal values ==='
b'Testing:' 5
b'Against:' 5
b'  == :' True
b'  != :' False
b'  <  :' False
b'  <= :' True
b'  >  :' False
b'  >= :' True
b'=== Different values ==='
b'Testing:' 3
b'Against:' 7
b'  == :' False
b'  != :' True
b'  <  :' True
b'  <= :' True
b'  >  :' False
b'  >= :' False
b'=== Negative values ==='
b'Testing:' -5
b'Against:' 3
b'  == :' False
b'  != :' True
b'  <  :' True
b'  <= :' True
b'  >  :' False
b'  >= :' False
b'=== Float equal ==='
b'Float testing:' 3.14
b'Float against:' 3.14
b'  == :' True
b'  != :' False
b'  <  :' False
b'  <= :' True
b'  >  :' False
b'  >= :' True
b'=== Float different ==='
b'Float testing:' 2.71
b'Float against:' 3.14
b'  == :' False
b'  != :' True
b'  <  :' True
b'  <= :' True
b'  >  :' False
b'  >= :' False
b'True == True:' True
b'True != False:' True
b'hello == hello:' True
b'hello != world:' True
b'100 is 100:' True
b'100 is not 100:' False
